title: Mission Sahasi
summary: Providing practical self-defence training and spreading awareness about women's safety among students.
description: In Haryana, ABVP has organised Mission Sahasi programmes to provide practical self-defence training and spread awareness about women's safety and empowerment among students. The initiative encourages young women to develop confidence, leadership qualities, and the courage to face adversity while fostering a safer and more responsible campus environment.
highlights: Encouraging courage and leadership in youth
